item.title: 什么是纳税人保护承诺？为什么它对数据中心很重要？
item.summary: As AI infrastructure spending accelerates, understanding who pays for the electricity it consumes has become one of the sector's defining questions. The Ratepayer Protection Pledge is the White House's answer. The post What is the Ratepayer Protection Pledge, and why does it matter for data centres? appeared first on C
